reasoning: The case (Doe v. Bonnell, 1:25-cv-20757) is currently scheduled for a jury trial on May 18, 2026. Typically, lawsuits settle on the "eve of trial" when the pressure of impending costs and risks forces the parties to the table. With the trial set for nearly five months into 2026, there is no natural legal pressure to settle by the end of 2025. Additionally, the litigation has been highly contentious. Pxie's case took a hit during the summer of 2025 after admissions in court that she shared the videos. Destiny has expressed confidence in winning a likely pending motion for summary judgment (or having the case dismissed), which sharply reduces his incentive to settle. Since settlement requires both parties to agree and there are no immediate deadlines forcing their hand before Dec 31, 2025, a settlement occurring within the next two months is highly unlikely. Given the historical market baseline of 10% and the subsequent October 2025 activity showing ongoing filings rather than settlement talks, I predict an 8% chance.
